title: Article of footwear
abstract: An article of footwear includes a sole and an upper. The upper includes a restrictive fabric portion. The restrictive fabric portion includes elastic and restrictive strands. A restrictive-side resistance index is greater than an elastic-side resistance index, when a tensile load is applied to the restrictive fabric portion in a direction of stretching the elastic and restrictive strands, where the restrictive-side resistance index is a ratio of an increase in tensile stress to an increase in rate of stretch of the restrictive strand, in a range in which a rate of stretch of the restrictive fabric portion is greater than a predetermined value, and the elastic-side resistance index is a ratio of an increase in tensile stress to an increase in rate of stretch of the elastic strand, in the range in which the rate of stretch of the restrictive fabric portion is greater than the predetermined value.
claims: 1. An article of footwear comprising a sole and an upper, wherein the upper includes a restrictive fabric portion having a function of restricting stretch, the restrictive fabric portion includes: an elastic strand that has elasticity; and a restrictive strand that has elasticity and is configured to restrict stretch of the elastic strand, the restrictive strand including a loosening portion that exhibits a loosening state in a range in which a rate of stretch of the restrictive fabric portion is less than or equal to a predetermined value, wherein the restrictive fabric portion has a restrictive-side resistance index greater than an elastic-side resistance index, when a tensile load is applied to the restrictive fabric portion in a direction of stretching the elastic strand and the restrictive strand, the restrictive-side resistance index is expressed as a ratio of an amount of increase in tensile stress to an amount of increase in rate of stretch of the restrictive strand, in a range in which a rate of stretch of the restrictive fabric portion is greater than the predetermined value, the elastic-side resistance index is expressed as a ratio of an amount of increase in tensile stress to an amount of increase in rate of stretch of the elastic strand, in the range in which the rate of stretch of the restrictive fabric portion is greater than the predetermined value, the loosening portion exhibits a state of stretching to a maximum extent in the range in which the rate of stretch of the restrictive fabric portion is greater than the predetermined value, to make the restrictive-side resistance index greater than the elastic-side resistance index in the range in which the rate of stretch of the restrictive fabric portion is greater than the predetermined value, the predetermined value is 25%, and the restrictive strand and the elastic strand are each configured such that, as the rate of stretch of the restrictive fabric portion is increased from the predetermined value to 50%, a tensile stress of the restrictive strand becomes greater than a tensile stress of the elastic strand at the 50% rate of stretch.
